title: CMA CGM India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: CMA CGM India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Warehouse Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
